info.title: Platform OneRoster Core Demo API
info.summary: Working OneRoster core API generated from the OneRoster core dictionary source.
info.description: This OpenAPI document is generated from dictionary/oneroster-core.v1.json. It describes the local Express/SQLite REST API. The GitHub Pages portal also exposes static JSON demo endpoints under https://andymontgomery-byte.github.io/platform/site/api/.

post.summary: Run a read-only SQL query against the demo database
post.description: Accepts SELECT or WITH queries only. This is the JSON wrapper for the relational demo layer.

examples: select display_name, primary_role from people order by display_name

get.description: An ID used by another system to refer to the same object the platform tracks.

parameters.description: Plain text search over common display fields.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the Source Identifier record.

Organization.description: A district, school, department, program, or other education organization.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this organization.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID used by the sending system.

type.description: The kind of organization this record represents.

parentOrganizationId.description: The organization that contains this one.

status.description: Whether the record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this organization record last changed.

Person.description: A learner, teacher, staff member, guardian, or administrator known to the platform.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this person.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID used by the sending system.

displayName.description: The name shown in user interfaces.

givenName.description: The person's first or given name.

familyName.description: The person's last or family name.

primaryRole.description: The person's broad role in the education environment.

enabledUser.description: Whether the person can currently sign in or be used as an active user.

status.description: Whether the person record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this person record last changed.

AcademicSession.description: A school year, term, semester, quarter, grading period, or other calendar window.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this academic session.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this calendar record.

startDate.description: The first date in the session.

endDate.description: The last date in the session.

schoolYear.description: The calendar year associated with the school year.

status.description: Whether the session record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this session record last changed.

Course.description: A course template or catalog entry, such as Grade 6 Mathematics.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this course.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this course.

courseCode.description: A local course code used by the school or district.

orgId.description: The organization that owns or offers the course.

schoolYearId.description: The school year this course belongs to, if the source provides one.

status.description: Whether the course record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this course record last changed.

Class.description: A scheduled class or section where learners and teachers meet around a course.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this class.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this class.

classType.description: Whether this is a normal scheduled class or another kind of class grouping.

classCode.description: A local code for the class section.

schoolId.description: The school where the class is offered.

termId.description: The academic session when the class runs.

status.description: Whether the class record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this class record last changed.

Enrollment.description: A record that says a person participates in a class with a specific role.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this enrollment.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this enrollment.

classId.description: The class where the person is enrolled.

personId.description: The learner, teacher, or other person in the class.

schoolId.description: The school associated with this enrollment.

role.description: The person's job in the class.

beginDate.description: The first date this enrollment applies.

endDate.description: The last date this enrollment applies.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary teacher or primary enrollment when the source makes that distinction.

status.description: Whether the enrollment record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this enrollment record last changed.

LineItem.description: A gradebook column, assignment, assessment, or activity that can receive results.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this gradebook item.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this line item.

classId.description: The class whose gradebook contains this item.

category.description: The local gradebook category for the item.

assignDate.description: The date the item was assigned.

dueDate.description: The date the item is due.

caseTargetUri.description: The CASE standard URI this gradebook item is aligned to when the target is known.

status.description: Whether the line item record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this line item record last changed.

Result.description: A learner's score, status, or feedback for a gradebook line item.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this result.

sourcedId.description: The OneRoster source ID for this result.

lineItemId.description: The gradebook item this result belongs to.

personId.description: The learner who received the result.

scoreStatus.description: The scoring state for this result.

scoreDate.description: When the score was assigned or last updated.

comment.description: Feedback or notes attached to the result.

status.description: Whether the result record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

dateLastModified.description: When the source system says this result record last changed.

SourceIdentifier.description: An ID used by another system to refer to the same object the platform tracks.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this source identifier record.

objectType.description: The kind of platform object this identifier describes.

objectId.description: The platform object that has this external identifier.

sourceSystem.description: The outside system that created or owns the identifier.

externalId.description: The actual identifier value used by the outside system.

identifierType.description: What kind of outside ID this is.

status.description: Whether the identifier record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
